name: Red V-dramon

signature_move.name: V-Breath Arrow
signature_move.description: Spews a high-temperature V-shaped heat ray from its mouth.

description: D1 Tamers next 0rder ⇨ Japanese A Mythical Dragon Digimon! It is said that when V-dramon is consumed by anger, it undergoes a glowing-red evolution, but... V-Breath Arrow A technique in which it spews a V-shaped high-temperature heat ray from its mouth. It is extraordinarily potent, and entirely effective against even powerful Digimon! Digimon Adventure 02: D1 Tamers ⇨ English げんりゅうがた デジモン！ ブイドラモンが いかりに つつまれた とき あかくかがやき シンカすると いわれ ているが… ブイブレスアロー Ｖがたのコウネツの ねっせんをクチから はきだすワザ ケタハズレのイリョク かありキョウリョクな デジモンにも じゅうぶんきくぞ！ デジモンアドベンチャー02 ディーワンテイマーズ ⇨ Japanese A variation of V-dramon whose body has been turned a deep red. It is said that V-dramon evolves into this form when it reaches the peak of its anger. Digimon World -next 0rder- ⇨ English 体が深紅に変化したブイドラモンの変種。ブイドラモンが怒りの頂点に達した時進化するといわれている。 デジモンワールド -next 0rder- ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K
